name: Calibre (Personal)
description: Self-hosted sideload source for the Calibre iOS app.

apps.name: Calibre
apps.localizedDescription: A native iOS marketplace for discovering, buying, and selling watches.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Calibre uses the camera to photograph watches you list for sale and, during seller verification, to capture identity documents.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Calibre lets you choose existing photos of your watch when creating a listing.
